body.docName: 分页查询预算方案列表
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/page-budget-parent-plan 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/page-budget-parent-plan 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于分页查询智能费控的预算方案列表
单次最多查询100条，支持方案名称、状态、起止时间和方案维度的搜索。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E5%B1%95%E7%A4%BA%E7%9A%84%E8%AE%B0%E5%BD%95%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"50","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E4%B8%BA100","maxLength":"3"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"query","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"1"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetDimension","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"3","desc":"%201-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A2-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A3-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%2B%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetEndDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2028-06-06","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0A%E7%AD%9B%E9%80%89%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E6%97%A9%E4%BA%8E%E6%88%96%E7%AD%89%E4%BA%8E%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E7%9A%84%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88","desc":"%20%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2%20","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetStartDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2023-06-06","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0A%E7%AD%9B%E9%80%89%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E6%99%9A%E4%BA%8E%E6%88%96%E7%AD%89%E4%BA%8E%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E7%9A%84%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetState","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8%0A1-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E4%BD%8D%E7%BD%AE","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA0","maxLength":"100"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"100","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"budgetParentPlanSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"100","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetStartDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2024-01-01","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetEndDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2025-12-31","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetDimension","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"3","desc":"%201-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A2-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A3-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%2B%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetState","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8%0D%0A1-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"crtName","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%A9","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%20false%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "opsEmpNumber": "001",
    "limit": 50,
    "query": {
        "budgetDimension": "3",
        "budgetEndDate": "2028-06-06",
        "budgetName": "测试",
        "budgetStartDate": "2023-06-06",
        "budgetState": "1"
    },
    "start": 0
}
```
### 调用成功的响应报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "total": 1,
        "list": [
            {
                "budgetParentPlanSeqId": 100,
                "budgetName": "测试预算方案导入",
                "budgetStartDate": "2024-01-01",
                "budgetEndDate": "2026-12-31",
                "budgetDimension": "3",
                "budgetState": "1",
                "crtName": "天"
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```
### 调用失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "code": "E0002",
    "message": "单页数量最小为1;"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
sucess为接口调用成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败
| 常见报错|
| --- |
| 单页数量最小为1|
| 单页数量最多100|
| 开始页面最小为0|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/page-budget-parent-plan

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/page-budget-parent-plan

接口描述

本接口适用于分页查询智能费控的预算方案列表 单次最多查询100条，支持方案名称、状态、起止时间和方案维度的搜索。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E5%B1%95%E7%A4%BA%E7%9A%84%E8%AE%B0%E5%BD%95%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"50","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E4%B8%BA100","maxLength":"3"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"query","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"1"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetDimension","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"3","desc":"%201-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A2-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A3-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%2B%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetEndDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2028-06-06","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0A%E7%AD%9B%E9%80%89%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E6%97%A9%E4%BA%8E%E6%88%96%E7%AD%89%E4%BA%8E%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E7%9A%84%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88","desc":"%20%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2%20","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetStartDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2023-06-06","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0A%E7%AD%9B%E9%80%89%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E6%99%9A%E4%BA%8E%E6%88%96%E7%AD%89%E4%BA%8E%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E7%9A%84%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetState","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8%0A1-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E4%BD%8D%E7%BD%AE","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA0","maxLength":"100"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"100","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"budgetParentPlanSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"100","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetStartDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2024-01-01","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetEndDate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2025-12-31","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BAyyyy-MM-dd%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetDimension","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BC%96%E5%88%B6%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"3","desc":"%201-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A2-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6%0D%0A3-%E6%8C%89%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%2B%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E7%BB%B4%E5%BA%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetState","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200-%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8%0D%0A1-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"crtName","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%A9","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%20false%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0D%0A%0D%0A","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
    "opsEmpNumber": "001",
    "limit": 50,
    "query": {
        "budgetDimension": "3",
        "budgetEndDate": "2028-06-06",
        "budgetName": "测试",
        "budgetStartDate": "2023-06-06",
        "budgetState": "1"
    },
    "start": 0
}

调用成功的响应报文

{
    "data": {
        "total": 1,
        "list": [
            {
                "budgetParentPlanSeqId": 100,

调用失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "code": "E0002",
    "message": "单页数量最小为1;"
}

错误码说明

sucess为接口调用成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败

常见报错
单页数量最小为1
单页数量最多100
开始页面最小为0
